envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Reviews are PROPOSED_NOT_REVIEWED. Map-blocking risks gate downstream activation. Neutral compliance vocabulary per ADR-0070. RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences absolute.

items.name: Risk Map Governance Review
items.description: Surfaces D3 Risk Map recommendation regions for admin review. Map-blocking risks gate downstream activation; unknown areas default to BLOCKED_BY_POLICY; RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences absolute.
items.human_readable_summary: Admin walks risk regions. Map-blocking risks require dual-control approval. Unknown areas default-forbid until reviewed.
items.model_usage_notes: Map-blocking risks + RULE-20 inferences require Security Lead + dual-control. Unknown areas surface for explicit review; cannot be silently approved.
escalation_path: Security Lead → Founder (ESCALATE_TO_FOUNDER for Map-blocking + RULE-20 modifications)
DMW_scope_implications: Approved Risk Map gates which DMW scopes may activate downstream
Map-blocking risks exclude their domains from any DMW scope
Compliance-sensitive surfaces require LawfulBasis per ADR-0036 at regulator-view DMW scope
Unknown areas default to forbidden-DMW until reviewed
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every Risk Map region before downstream maps activate
Map-blocking risks gate Tool / Workflow / Connector / Memory Map activation
Neutral compliance vocabulary mandatory per ADR-0070
No claims of regulator approval, no claims of guaranteed compliance
RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences absolute regardless of plan tier
audit_expectations: future BREAK_GLASS_* + LawfulBasis per ADR-0050 + ADR-0036
